title: Make Sustainability Second Nature

headers.text: Build a resilient team.Pursue a sustainable planet.
Design authentic, brand-aligned learning experiences in minutes.
Choose from 70+ measurable sustainability actions or customize your own.
Track individual, team, and company environmental impacts for CO2, water, and waste.
Energize employees with friendly competitions and team collaborations.
Build camaraderie by giving employees a secure, private network to share actions and achievements.
Clearyst + JouleBug Waste Less, Nourish More Challenge 2025
EarthShare Texas: Driving Change in Corporate Culture
JouleBug, Wild For All Named Honorable Mention in Fast Company World Changing Ideas 2023

paragraphs: JouleBug is an employee engagement mobile app that educates and mobilizes your people to take action toward your company’s sustainability goals.

Your company is feeling the pressure to make progress on sustainability goals, but traditional training tools don’t measure impact or equip employees to live out your values in practical, powerful ways.JouleBug engages your people in real-world activities and hands-on experiences that shift habits and produce measurable results. Our challenges combine collaboration and competition to advance your mission through the power of play, education, and collective action.
We make it simple, easy, and fun to engage your people in achieving sustainability goals.
Positive impact is just a single step away.

We make it simple, easy, and fun to engage your people in achieving sustainability goals. In 2023, JouleBug participants collectively saved: Positive impact is just a single step away.
